themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "And at the king's commandment they made a chest, and set it without at the gate of the house...". Word-study detail reinforces "וַֽיַּעֲשׂ֖וּ: they made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application".
